raw_response:
I agree with the final selected answer being B ("Laser beam is used"). While modern CEREC machines do indeed employ different types of beams such as infrared or blue light for scanning purposes, many older versions specifically utilized laser beams due to their precision capabilities. This makes "laser beam" a valid description even though more recent advancements might involve alternative methods. Thus, maintaining consistency with historical accuracy while acknowledging technological evolution supports choosing B over other options. Final Answer: B. Disagreeing would imply another mechanism was predominantly used historically or currently, which isn't supported here. Hence my agreement stands firm. **Final Answer**: B.**
